REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANTS EIZA AZAR, MARIAN AZAR'S DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND FOR PLAINTIFFS TO SEPARATE THEIR CLAIMS INTO SEPARATE CAUSES OF ACTION. CURRENTLY THERE ARE AT LEAST TWO SEPARATE AND DISTINCT CLAIMS BROUGHT BY DIFFERENT PLAINTIFFS AGAINST THE SAME DEFENDANT AND THERE IS NO DISTINCTION BETWEEN FACTUAL ALLEGATIONS AS TO THOSE PLAINTIFFS, I.E. A CAUSE OF ACTION BROUGHT BY RIPTIDE, WHERE Q &M LLC IS THE "THIRD PARTY;" AND A CAUSE OF ACTION BY Q & M, LLC WHERE RIPTIDE IS THE "THIRD PARTY." PLAINTIFFS SHALL HAVE 10 DAYS TO FILE AN AMENDED COMPLAINT ASSERTING SEPARATE CAUSES OF ACTION FOR INTERFERENCE WITH ECONOMIC ADVANTAGE AND ALLEGING FACTS IN SUPPORT OF EACH ELEMENT OF EACH CAUSE OF ACTION AS TO EACH PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH CCP 430.41 IN FUTURE. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, CLERK: A. PASCUAL, NOT REPORTED (D501)

DEFENDANTs EIZA AZAR and MARIAN AZAR's DEMURRER TO 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED in part and OVERRULED in part. Demurrer to the fourth and fifth causes of action is overruled. These causes of action are sufficiently alleged. Demurrer to the sixth cause of action is sustained without leave to amend. Plaintiffs failed to allege facts in support of each element of this cause of action and failed to suggest what additional factual allegation can be made to state a claim for interference with prospective economic advantage by Mobley and Quinby. MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS EIZA AZAR, MARIAN AZAR'S DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT is Sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiffs to separate their claims into separate causes of action. Currently there are at least two separate and distinct claims brought by different plaintiffs against the same defendant and there is no distinction between factual allegations as to those plaintiffs, i.e. a cause of action brought by Riptide, where Q &M LLC is the "third party;" and a cause of action by Q & M, LLC where Riptide is the "third party." Plaintiffs shall have 10 days to file an amended complaint asserting separate causes of action for interference with economic advantage and alleging facts in support of each element of each cause of action as to each plaintiff.
